# Applied AI Retrieval Evaluation

Sanitized project fixture describing eval-first applied AI work with grounded
retrieval and claim validation.

## Evidence

- [EV-AI-RAG] Built a lexical retrieval evaluation harness with chunk-level evidence IDs, citation checks, recall at k, precision at k, and mean reciprocal rank metrics.
- [EV-AI-SAFETY] Added unsupported-claim checks for generated bullets, including missing evidence IDs, unverified skills, fabricated metrics, and raw PII or URL leakage.
- [EV-AI-COST] Recorded model-call latency, token usage, and fallback status in local artifacts before any production promotion decision.
